title: acilepis aspera
intro: Acilepis aspera, also known as Wedelia aspera, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to India and parts of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Acilepis aspera include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in Ayurvedic medicine. Herbal preparations of Acilepis aspera can be found in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powder, often used to treat a range of health conditions.
